Chinese: 氣象局已發出特別天氣信息
Portuguese: Foi emitido um aviso meteorológico especial.
English: The special weather advisory has been issued.

Chinese: 由於持續受活躍西南氣流及低壓槽影響，預料本澳今日 (18日)仍有大驟雨及雷暴，稍後雨勢逐漸緩和；請市民留意天氣變化，提防可能出現之強對流天氣或強烈陣風所造成的影響，低窪地區需要提防因持續強降雨而引致水浸，並關注本局發出的提示及警告。(於 2026年06月18日07時00分 更新)
Portuguese: Devido à influência contínua de uma corrente de ar de sudoeste activa e de um vale depressionário, esperam-se aguaceiros fortes e trovoadas hoje, Quinta-feira (18). Prevê-se que os aguaceiros diminuam ao longo do dia. Aconselha-se à população que preste atenção às alterações meteorológicas e acompanhe os avisos e alertas emitidos pela DSMG.( Data de actualização: 2026-06-18 07H00 )
English: Due to the continuous influence of an active southwesterly airstream and a trough of low pressure, heavy showers and thunderstorms are expected today (18th June). The rainfall is expected to gradually ease later. The public is advised to pay attention to weather changes and take precautions against potential impacts caused by severe convective weather or strong gusts, be aware of the possibility of flooding in low-lying areas due to persistent heavy showers, and follow the alerts and warnings issued by SMG.( Update Time: 2026-06-18 07H00 )
